creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
loader_lua has been broken between r360472 and r360780. All my upgraded systems became unbootable with this error:
 
Startup error in /boot/lua/loader.lua:
LUA ERROR: /boot/lua/loader.lua:44: attempt to call a nil value (field 'isUEFIBoot').

The issue is really severe since requires console access to boot from another media to fix it. It's probably the worst bugs I have ever reported.
